name: velinwebsite
description: Recovered Velin Django website with restored labelled assets and local helper scripts.

scripts.dev: cmd /c if not exist .venv py -m venv .venv && .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.txt && .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe manage.py migrate && .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe manage.py runserver 127.0.0.1:5173
scripts.consumer: cmd /c if not exist .venv py -m venv .venv && .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.txt && .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe manage.py migrate && .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe manage.py runserver 127.0.0.1:5173
scripts.admin: cmd /c if not exist .venv py -m venv .venv && .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.txt && .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe manage.py migrate && .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe manage.py runserver 127.0.0.1:5174
scripts.build: cmd /c if not exist .venv py -m venv .venv && .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.txt && .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe manage.py check
